name: Group of Seven
climate: Predominantly temperate; ranges from subarctic in northern Canada to Mediterranean in southern Europe and humid subtropical in southern Japan

neighbors.name: European Union
neighbors.relevance: France, Germany, Italy are EU members; G7 and EU policy closely aligned

neighbors.name: Five Eyes
neighbors.relevance: USA, UK, Canada overlap; intelligence sharing underpins G7 security coordination

neighbors.name: Group of Twenty
neighbors.relevance: G7 is a subset of G20; advanced economies caucus within broader forum

neighbors.name: Eurozone
neighbors.relevance: France, Germany, Italy share the euro; ECB monetary policy affects G7 coordination

neighbors.name: NAFTA/USMCA
neighbors.relevance: USA, Canada are G7 members and USMCA partners; North American trade integration

links.description: G7 and BRICS represent competing visions for global governance and financial architecture

Three G7 members are EU states; shared trade, climate, and regulatory policy
Three G7 members in Five Eyes; intelligence informs G7 sanctions and security policy
G7 supply chain resilience agenda focused on reducing Indo-Pacific chokepoint risks
USA and UK in both G7 and AUKUS; defense technology sharing
